title: MORK BORG with Solitary Defilement - Session Zero
body:
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=goQs8La8e94

Daniel (@dungeondive) begins a four-part Mörk Borg solo campaign using the Solitary Defilement rules. In this session zero, he creates the character Vimet Heleg, a beastly scholar driven by revenge after being attacked and left for dead. His goal: trek across the land to the port city of Pigskin Port to find a barber surgeon who will graft his attacker's severed arm onto his body so he can use it as a weapon. The character creation process is quick and simple, establishing the adventure's dark premise and setting the stage for overland, city, and dungeon crawls to follow.

----

What character concepts or revenge narratives would drive your Mörk Borg adventures?
